prompt: Greek amphitheater during a classic play, actors in ancient costumes, with spectators seated on carved stone steps.
prompt_refined: A sun-drenched, ancient Greek amphitheater carved from light-colored stone. On the central stage, several actors in historically accurate, flowing ancient Greek togas and tunics are performing a dramatic scene from a classic play. The tiered, carved stone seating steps are filled with a large, attentive audience of spectators.
